title: Marbella Private Boat Charter Wedding: Costs, Boats & Tips for 2026
html:
Planning a private boat charter wedding in Marbella offers a unique blend of Mediterranean glamour and intimate celebration. Depart from Puerto Banús with up to twelve guests and expect prices from €3,500 for a half-day ceremony on a luxury motor yacht. BoatHire24 makes it easy to compare vessels and skippers for your big day.

How much does a private boat charter wedding in Marbella cost?

A full-day wedding charter for up to twelve guests typically costs between €3,500 and €8,000 in 2026. The price depends on the boat size, catering, and duration. For a precise quote, you can book a charter online through BoatHire24, which lists verified operators with transparent pricing.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat for a wedding in Marbella?

No licence is required if you hire a skippered charter, as most wedding parties do. The operator handles all navigation and safety. If you wish to self-drive, Spanish law requires a specific licence for boats over a certain length; the operator confirms exact requirements at booking.

For the most stable wedding photographs, choose a morning charter when the sea is calmer and the light soft. Afternoon winds can pick up, especially the Levante, making hair and dress less manageable.

Where to set off in Marbella for a wedding charter

Puerto Banús is the most famous departure point, with its luxury marina and celebrity associations. Other real options include Puerto Deportivo de Marbella, a smaller marina closer to the old town, and Cabopino Port, which is quieter and nearer to the sand dunes of Artola. For a longer voyage, set off from Estepona Marina or La Duquesa port; both offer easy access to the Costa del Sol coastline.

Which boat to rent for a wedding ceremony at sea

  1. Sunseeker 63, ideal for an elegant ceremony with twelve guests; from €4,500 for four hours. For full details, see this motor yacht on BoatHire24.
  2. Azimut 50, best for a smaller, intimate wedding for eight guests; from €3,200 for half a day.
  3. Lagoon 450 catamaran, offers stable deck space for twelve guests and a shallow draft for coastal anchoring; from €4,000 for six hours.
  4. Astondoa 72, a flybridge model for fourteen guests with a large sundeck; from €5,500 for a full day.

Typical wedding charter costs

  • Shared wedding mini-cruise (not private): from €150 per person for a two-hour sunset sail.
  • Small motorboat half-day private (up to six guests): from €1,800.
  • Catamaran full-day private (twelve guests): from €4,000.
  • Full-crewed luxury yacht with catering and photographer (twelve guests): from €7,000.

At a glance

  • Price band: €1,800 to €8,000
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Trip length: half-day (4 hours) or full-day (8 hours)
  • Guest capacity: up to twelve (regulated by the boat licence)
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Marbella

Can I get married on a boat in Marbella legally?

Yes, but the ceremony must be performed by a captain who holds the authority to conduct civil weddings or by a registrar who boards the vessel.

What happens if the weather is bad on my wedding day?

Most operators offer a flexible rescheduling policy or a refund if the port authority prohibits departure due to wind or sea state.

How far from the coast will we sail during the ceremony?

Typical wedding charters sail between one and three nautical miles offshore, with the coast of Marbella and the Sierra Blanca mountains as a backdrop.

Is catering included in the charter price?

Catering is often extra; expect to pay from €60 per person for a three-course meal with champagne.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Marbella or list your own. For your wedding charter, browse the listings to compare skippered yachts with transparent reviews. If you own a suitable vessel, consider becoming a host on the platform to reach couples planning their 2026 celebration.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Marbella and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
